name: check-pr
tagline: Reviews GitHub/GitLab/Perforce PRs for CI status, review comments, and description gaps, then optionally fixes and resolves threads.
verdict: Solid, highly actionable multi-platform PR-review skill with concrete commands, deterministic platform detection, and a clear output format. Weak spots: no stated out-of-scope guidance so it could misfire on adjacent git tasks, and jq is used throughout without being declared as a required tool.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere; skill could misfire on adjacent git/CI tasks.
compatibility field declares git/gh/glab/p4 but jq is invoked pervasively (e.g. line 57, 148-206) without being declared or checked.
